nasb.text: The grain offering and the drink offering are cut off From the house of the Lord. The priests mourn, The ministers of the Lord.

esv.text: The grain offering and the drink offering are cut off from the house of the Lord. The priests mourn, the ministers of the Lord.

cnv.text: 素祭和奠祭都從耶和華的殿裡斷絕了， 事奉耶和華的祭司也都悲哀。

ccb.text: 耶和华殿中的素祭和奠祭都停止了， 事奉耶和华的祭司都哀伤。
